title: SoloLeveling999
description: SoloLeveling999 — Forge your own power as you slay mobs, level up, and master four core stats—Agility, Strength, Vitality, and Attack Speed—to evolve from an ordinary survivor into an unstoppable force.
body:
⚔️ SoloLeveling999 – Rise Beyond Your Limits

Step into a world where every swing, every step, and every battle shapes your destiny.
In SoloLeveling999, you begin as an ordinary survivor — fragile, mortal, and weak — but through blood, grit, and endless determination, you’ll carve your path to true power.

🌟 Level Up and Grow Stronger

Every mob you defeat grants experience, pushing you closer to the next level.
Each time you level up, you’ll earn stat points that can be spent to customize your build:

💨 Agility – Move faster, react quicker, and outmaneuver your foes.

💪 Strength – Strike harder, crush armor, and unleash devastating melee power.

❤️ Vitality – Become unbreakable with increased health and endurance.

⚡ Attack Speed – Swing faster than ever and overwhelm your enemies in seconds.

No more staying weak — your power is yours to shape.

🧭 Forge Your Own Path

Access your Main Menu with /maingui to track your progress, view your level, and enter the Stats Menu to spend points.
Every choice is permanent, every upgrade meaningful.
Will you be a swift assassin, a tanky juggernaut, or a perfectly balanced warrior?

🧱 Seamless Integration, True Progression

Works on Paper, Spigot, or Bukkit with no custom textures or external dependencies.

All progress — level, stats, and EXP — is stored safely in YAML files for easy management.

Fully configurable EXP, scaling, and progression system so you can fine-tune the grind to your liking.

🌌 The Power Is Yours

Slay monsters, level up, and transcend the limits of humanity.
From humble beginnings to godlike might, your legend in SoloLeveling999 will echo across the server.

“In this world, power is everything — and yours is only beginning to awaken.”
